title: [release-1.9] Bump to release version 1.9.4
body:
This branch is utilized for RHEL releases and therefore should never ever represent a `-dev` development release.  Bump the version number to account for the change.

Resolves: RHEL-97102

comments.body: Oh okay, I wasn't sure.  Yes leaving a gap would be confusing, I'll fix it here and in my other PRs.
force-push: Updated version number as suggested.
